mnemonics.title: RGB Order
mnemonics.content: Remember RGB component order as 'Real Good Beer' or 'Red Green Blue'

mnemonics.title: HSI Components
mnemonics.content: HSI: Hue (What color), Saturation (How pure), Intensity (How bright)

mnemonics.title: Additive vs Subtractive
mnemonics.content: ADDitive: ADD light (RGB for screens). SUBtractive: SUBtract light (CMYK for printing)
